    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Group
    The group for an INI file.
    INIFile
    The API for the access to Windows-style configuration files.
    INIFile.Entry
    An entry for the INI file.
    INIFileImpl
    The implementation for INIFile.
    Value
    The container for the value of an INI file.
